name: loopsmith
description: Loop engineering for coding agents: a maker/checker verification loop with an independent grader and a budget estimator.

plugins.name: loopsmith
plugins.description: Wrap any code task in a maker/checker verification loop. A maker writes the change, an independent checker runs tests/lint/build and reviews the diff against intent, and it retries until it passes or a stop condition fires. Ships three skills: verify-loop, grade, loop-cost.
